name: get_current_weather
description: Retrieves real-time weather conditions for a specified location, including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and sky conditions. Optionally includes air quality index (AQI) data.

location.description: The location to retrieve weather for. Accepts city name, 'City, Country', ZIP code, or 'latitude,longitude' coordinate pair.
location.$comment: Free-form string to support multiple geocoding input formats. Backend geocodes to coordinates internally.

units.description: Unit system for temperature and wind speed measurements.

include_aqi.description: Whether to include Air Quality Index (AQI) and pollutant concentration data in the response.
include_aqi.$comment: AQI data requires a separate API call to pollution endpoints; defaults to false to reduce latency.
